name: Goddess Shoulder Chain
description: Your dress is already the one. This is the detail that makes the whole look completely, unforgettably yours. Draped softly from the neck across both shoulders, handcrafted in tarnish-resistant stainless steel — available in gold or silver.
fullDescription:
This dainty shoulder chain drapes softly from the neck across both shoulders and down the upper arms, adding a delicate layered shimmer to strapless gowns, off-the-shoulder dresses, and sweetheart necklines. It sits so lightly you forget you are wearing it — until you catch it in a photo and realize it made the whole look.

Handmade from durable stainless steel in gold or silver, so it holds its colour and resists tarnishing through the ceremony, the dancing, and every moment in between.

specs.label: Custom fit
specs.value: Message us after checkout — we adjust every chain length at no extra cost

specs.label: Care
specs.value: Wipe gently with a soft cloth after wear. Store in an airtight container.

name: Bridal Shoulder Chain
description: The one detail your wedding look is missing. This minimalist shoulder chain sweeps delicately across your upper arm, attaching directly to your dress or bra so it stays perfectly in place all day. Handmade from tarnish-resistant stainless steel — available in gold or silver.
fullDescription:
A dainty, sweeping arm chain designed for brides who want that extra shimmer without the fuss. It clips directly to your dress strap or bra with a choice of lobster clasp or pearl safety pin, so there's no trip to the tailor and no pinning involved.

Lightweight and virtually weightless, it moves with you through the ceremony, the first dance, and everything in between. Handmade from high-quality stainless steel in gold or silver — tarnish-resistant and built to last well beyond your big day.

specs.label: Attachment
specs.value: Choice of lobster clasp or pearl safety pin

specs.label: Custom fit
specs.value: Message us after ordering — we resize to your exact measurements at no extra cost

specs.label: Care
specs.value: Wipe gently with a soft cloth after each wear. Store in an airtight container.

name: Double Shoulder Chest Chain
description: Two shoulders. One statement. This delicate chest chain drapes symmetrically across both shoulders and layers down the front, adding effortless shimmer to any off-the-shoulder or strapless look. Handmade from tarnish-resistant stainless steel in gold or silver.
fullDescription:
Where most shoulder chains cover one side, this one goes further — draping softly over both shoulders with layered chains that fall across the chest in perfect symmetry. The result is balanced, elegant, and completely unforgettable on a strapless gown, a white linen dress, or a simple black top.

Handmade from high-quality stainless steel in gold or silver tone, so it holds its colour and resists tarnishing through every wear.

specs.label: Style
specs.value: Double shoulder with layered chest drape

specs.label: Custom fit
specs.value: Message us after ordering — we resize to your exact measurements at no extra cost

specs.label: Care
specs.value: Wipe gently with a soft cloth after wear. Store in an airtight container.
